[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10100011 4
1 01001100 3
2 01000000 1
3 01001100 3
4 11010101 5
5 10000111 4
6 01001000 2
7 11101100 5
